title: Templates and diff helper
meta: Commit daabbfa · tier full · entry #3 of 6
glance: Adds HTML/Markdown templates with interactive quiz JS, plus understanding-diff.mjs to gather git context for agents.
backgroundDeep: Templates give consistent structure; the script outputs diff-context.json so agents write facts before prose.
backgroundNarrow: Commits #1–#2 had instructions but no scaffolds or npm command.
goal: One command → diff context → agent fills template.
figure: npm run understanding:diff→diff-context.json→explainer.html
intuition: HTML template includes working quiz JavaScript. Code blocks use pre-wrap so newlines don't collapse.

steps.label: understanding-diff.mjs
steps.body: --commit or --branch; writes diff-context.json and suggests folder.

quiz.q: What does the diff script NOT do?

options: HTML for quiz; MD for git/search
